calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-08-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-20-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Jeffrey M. Singletary, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.
No appearance by defendant Leah M. Dimas.
Default was entered against defendant on March 23, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on March 23, 2010.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on April 23, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., and against the Defaulted Defendant Leah M. Dimas as follows:

Damages/Principal - $250,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $24,176.97.
Attorney's Fees - Reserved.
Costs - $591.50, for a total judgment in the amount of $274,768.47.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2010 Continued To Jun-21-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for Plaintiff. The OSC is re-set to 6/21/2010 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)
